g.text: Figure 6. RMCT controlled vocabulary, thesaurus and company profile construction

text.style: font-size: 8.5px; font-family: 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start; fill: #687385

g.text: Heterogeneous public website expressions are normalised into searchable capability labels and aggregated into firm-level profiles.
